description:
Cross-platform fitting tool for EVE Online

Pyfa, short for python fitting assistant, allows you to create, experiment with, and save ship fittings without being in game. Open source and written in Python, it is available on any platform where Python 3 and wxWidgets are available, including Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Database:
- Updated for the latest version of release 24.01, which contains:
  - New volatile boosters
  - Breacher DC
  - BC and T3D-specific FW site effects (#2781)
Changes:
- Overhauled application profile graph (#2779, thanks @GET-R3AL!)
- Do not treat Apotheosis and Metamorphosis as limited issue ships (#2773)
Fixes:
- Export mutated item info in canonical format (#2778, thanks @BHBNSN!)
- Fixed CJK glyph display on graphs (#2768, thanks @EVE-Rangeen!)
- Hawk RoF bonus is properly applied to civilian LM launcher
- Fixed Medium Deep Core Mining Optimization I Rig (#2774)
